modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: SMART Board display is unresponsive and frozen.

full_description_text: The SMART Board is frozen. I was trying to use it in the classroom. Nothing is responding, and I can't get it to work.
short_description: SMART Board display is unresponsive and frozen.
description: The SMART Board is frozen. I was trying to use it in the classroom. Nothing is responding, and I can't get it to work.
